svg.text: Expert capacity and token overflow (T=12, K=2, N=4, cf=1.0, C=6)
each expert has a fixed buffer of 6 slots — tokens beyond capacity are dropped
t9: dropped from E1 → still processed by E2 (accepted). t11: dropped from E1 → still processed by E3.
t12: dropped from E2 → still processed by E4. All dropped tokens had a second expert available.
